final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI asset types arranged in a layered, hierarchical layout — web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls all visible
Subject: must include:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components
  - Button components
  - UI controls / widgets
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep tech-atmosphere backdrop — exact environment treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact tech atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact palette and accent ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-gloss surface treatment with strong visual hierarchy — exact finish and depth is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five UI asset categories; visual hierarchy and depth layers must be clearly readable
Avoid:
